prompt: Edit image 1 (Unsplash homepage) by replacing the "Log in / Sign up" area with the user profile picture and name section from image 2 (Unsplash profile). Integrate the profile circle and name "Alex Jiang" into the header bar.

objects: Circular user profile picture in the top-right header
